value.stringValue: An active Phase Baseline has been found so please choose the correct option

value.stringValue: No active Award Baseline has been found so please choose the correct option

value.stringValue: No parent Award Duration record has been found

choices.name: chcCreateBaseline
choices.choiceText: Create first Baseline for future Phase

choices.name: chcEditPhase_wo_Baseline
choices.choiceText: Edit existing Phase with no Baseline

choices.name: chcReviseAwardBaseline
choices.choiceText: Revise Baseline for total Award Duration

choices.name: chcRevisePhaseBaseline
choices.choiceText: Revise Baseline for an active Phase

rules.name: Current_Phase_Baseline_to_Edit_Found
rules.label: Current Phase Baseline to Edit Found

decisions.name: Check_Parent_Time_Period_Found
decisions.label: Check Parent Time Period Found
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: ERROR - No Parent Time Period Found

decisions.name: Check_SP_or_LG_Current_Baseline_Found
decisions.label: Check SP or LG Current Baseline Found

Flow.description: Screenflow to allow adjustments to baselines and phases
Flow.label: DESNZ - Baseline Manager

fields.name: Baseline_Record_Error_Text
